prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-FIRSTAIDKIT-100PC Product Type: FIRST_AID_KIT Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Emergency 1 Person Survival First Aid kit for Camping Hunting Survival Activities Description: Have you ever found yourself in a situation where you needed emergency supplies but didn't have any on hand? These situations can range in urgency from a child needing a bandage for a small cut or scrape to helping someone who is badly hurt and there are no available first responders. Time is critical when someone is injured, and even small injuries can become big injuries without immediate assistance. To address this, we've put together the ASR Outdoor 100 Piece First Aid Kit containing supplies to help you treat minor injuries and wounds, which will provide some peace of mind and ensure you have the ability to respond quickly until medical professionals can arrive.

Inside of the first response kit, you'll find supplies for cleaning and protecting wounds as well as tools to assist in your first response efforts. The cleaning supplies included are 10 alcohol wipes, 4 sting relief wipes, soap wipes, iodine prep pad, and cotton swabs. To protect the wound once it's been thoroughly cleaned, we've also included 20 medium-sized bandages, 15 large bandages, 5 mini bandages, 5 circular bandages, 1 butterfly bandage, 1 elastic gauze bandage, 1 moleskin sheet, 1 eye pad, 2 burn gels, 1 emergency blanket, and 1 fever cooling patch. These different sized bandages along with the additional supplies should be able to address the most common minor injuries such as a cut, scrape, burn or blister.

To help you properly clean and protect wounds, we've included these tools: 6 safety pins, 1 pair of gloves, 1 CPR mask, 1 tweezer, 1 medical tape roll, 1 EMT scissor, and 1 TPE tourniquet. These tools will help you dress wounds and stop or slow blood flow of injuries until first responders can arrive. It's important to use a CPR mask when giving CPR so that you can protect yourself as well as the injured individual Search Terms: medical kit first aid supplies list box ifak items bag travel car mini basic hiking small Features: - CLEANING SUPPLIES - Alcohol Wipes, Sting Relief Wipes, Cleaning Wipes, Soap Wipes, Iodine Wipes and Cotton Swabs to Properly Clean Wounds and Injuries - PROTECT WOUNDS - Dress Wounds once Cleaned with a Variety of Bandage Sizes, Moleskin Sheet, Eye Pad, Burn Gels, Fever Cooling Patch and Emergency Blanket - FIRST RESPONSE TOOLS - Comes with Safety Pins, Gloves, CPR Mask, Tweezer, Medical Tape, EMT Scissor and TPE Tourniquet | Provide Immediate Assistance until Medical Professionals Arrive - WATERPROOF DRY SACK - All Supplies Fit Neatly Inside Lightweight Waterproof Sack (7.5" x 5" x 3", .6lbs) | Great Size for Travel, Camping, Backpacking - HIGH-VISIBILITY COLOR - Bright Red First Aid Dry Sack with Hanging Hook Easily Located in Poor Lighting Conditions like Trunk of Car, Garage, Basement or Bad Weather === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 100-Piece Emergency First Aid Kit Red

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 1-Person Red Emergency First Aid Kit

anthropic.title_differentiation: 100 Supplies, Waterproof Dry Sack, CPR Mask, Tourniquet, Travel Ready, High Visibility Red

openai.title_differentiation: 100 Piece, Waterproof Dry Sack, Wound Cleaning Supplies, Bandages, CPR Mask, Tourniquet, Travel Ready
